metadata.description: Staging registry for skills not yet published to the opendatahub-io/skills-registry. Entries here should be migrated to the official registry once stable.

plugins.description: Strategy creation, refinement, and review skills for RHAISTRAT Jira tickets. Provides strategy-create, strategy-refine, strategy-review, and specialized review sub-skills.
plugins.name: strat-creator

plugins.description: Fork of strat-creator with reorganized scripts for marketplace compatibility. Uses ${CLAUDE_SKILL_DIR} paths and removes context:fork from skills that don't need it.
plugins.name: strat-creator-fork
